resources.string: E-Loop
EcoBot Assistant
Ask your question here…
Send
"Hello! 👋 I\'m EcoBot, your personal assistant for electronic device recycling ♻️\n\nChoose an option below or type your question!"
💰 Device Price
♻️ How to recycle
📍 Nearest center
⭐ Points system
📱 Samsung Price
💻 Laptop Price
📱 iPhone 15 Price
📱 iPhone 14 Price
📱 S24 Price
📱 S23 Price
📱 iPhone Price
📱 Mobile Price
📟 Tablet Price
🚚 Pickup Service
👋 Bye

"Hello! 👋 I'm EcoBot, your personal assistant for electronic device recycling ♻️

I can help you with:
• 💰 Device valuations & prices
• ♻️ Recycling information
• 📍 Nearest collection centers
• ⭐ Points and rewards system

Choose an option below or type your question!"

"📱 iPhone 15

💰 New Price: ~35,000 EGP
♻️ Used Price: ~24,500 EGP
🌿 ELoop Value: ~4,900 EGP
⭐ ELoop Points: 2,450 points

Price varies based on condition:
✨ Perfect: Full price
📝 Minor scratches: -10%
💔 Broken screen: -40%
❌ Dead/Not working: -70%

💡 Tip: Even broken devices have recycling value!"

"📱 iPhone 14

💰 New Price: ~25,000 EGP
♻️ Used Price: ~17,500 EGP
🌿 ELoop Value: ~3,500 EGP
⭐ ELoop Points: 1,750 points

💡 Tip: Trade in your old device to get a discount on a new one!"

"📱 iPhone 13

💰 New Price: ~18,000 EGP
♻️ Used Price: ~12,600 EGP
🌿 ELoop Value: ~2,520 EGP
⭐ ELoop Points: 1,260 points

💡 Tip: Every 100 EGP = 50 ELoop points!"

"📱 Samsung Galaxy S24

💰 New Price: ~30,000 EGP
♻️ Used Price: ~21,000 EGP
🌿 ELoop Value: ~4,200 EGP
⭐ ELoop Points: 2,100 points

💡 Tip: Your old device might be worth more than you think!"

"📱 Samsung Galaxy S23

💰 New Price: ~22,000 EGP
♻️ Used Price: ~15,400 EGP
🌿 ELoop Value: ~3,080 EGP
⭐ ELoop Points: 1,540 points"

"📱 Samsung Galaxy Prices:

• Galaxy S24: ~30,000 EGP (new)
• Galaxy S23: ~22,000 EGP (new)
• Galaxy S22: ~15,000 EGP (new)
• Galaxy S21: ~11,000 EGP (new)
• A-Series: 5,000–8,000 EGP (new)

🌿 ELoop Value = 20% of used market price
⭐ Every 100 EGP = 50 points

💡 Tell me a specific model for a detailed valuation!"

"📱 Mobile Phone Categories:

🍎 iPhone:
• iPhone 15: ~35,000 EGP
• iPhone 14: ~25,000 EGP
• iPhone 13: ~18,000 EGP
• iPhone 12: ~13,000 EGP

📱 Samsung:
• Galaxy S24: ~30,000 EGP
• Galaxy S23: ~22,000 EGP
• Galaxy S22: ~15,000 EGP

🌿 ELoop Value = 20% of used market price

💡 Tell me your exact device name for a full valuation!"

"💻 Laptop Prices:

🍎 MacBook:
• MacBook Air M2: ~30,000 EGP
• MacBook Air M1: ~20,000 EGP

💻 Windows:
• Dell XPS / HP Spectre: 18,000–25,000 EGP
• Mid-range laptops: 8,000–15,000 EGP

🌿 ELoop Value = 20% of used market price
⭐ Old laptops = lots of points!

💡 Tip: Even broken laptops have great value in recycling due to raw materials!"

"📟 Tablet Prices:

• iPad Pro: ~25,000 EGP
• iPad Air: ~12,000 EGP
• Samsung Tab S: ~15,000 EGP

🌿 ELoop Value = 20% of used market price

💡 Tip: Turn your old tablet into rewards instead of keeping it in a drawer!"

"📸 Camera Prices:

• DSLR/Mirrorless: 10,000–40,000 EGP
• Compact Cameras: 3,000–8,000 EGP

🌿 ELoop Value = 20% of used market price

💡 Tip: Electronics recycling reduces toxic waste in landfills!"

"💰 Valuations in ELoop:

We evaluate your devices based on:
• 📱 Device brand and model
• ✨ Physical condition
• 📊 Current market data

Accepted device types:
• 📱 Mobiles
• 💻 Laptops
• 📟 Tablets
• 📸 Cameras
• 🖨️ Printers
• 🎮 Gaming Consoles

💡 Go ahead and tell me your device name to get a price estimate!"

"♻️ How to recycle with ELoop:

1️⃣ Open the app and select your device type
2️⃣ Scan your device or enter details manually
3️⃣ Get an instant AI valuation
4️⃣ Choose: Sell or drop-off at a center
5️⃣ Get your money + ELoop Points! 🎉

🌍 Every recycled device protects our environment!

💡 Tip: Always wipe your personal data before handling over any device!"

"⭐ ELoop Points System:

📊 How to earn points:
• ♻️ Recycle a device = points based on value
• 📝 Every 100 EGP recycled = 50 points
• 📸 Scan a device = 10 points
• 📖 Read an eco-article = 5 points
• 👥 Invite a friend = 100 points

🎁 Redeem points for:
• Discounts on new electronics
• Shopping vouchers from our partners
• Donations to environmental charities

💡 Tip: Check the Leaderboard and compete with friends!"

"🚚 ELoop Pickup Service:

⏰ Pickup Schedule:
• Requests are fulfilled within 24–48 hours
• Available Saturday to Thursday
• From 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM

📋 Steps:
1️⃣ Register your device in the app
2️⃣ Select a convenient time and add your address
3️⃣ Our rep will be at your doorstep!

💡 Tip: The pickup service is completely free! 🎉"

"📍 ELoop Collection Centers:

We have centers in multiple locations:
• 🏪 Cairo - Nasr City
• 🏪 Cairo - Maadi
• 🏪 Giza - Dokki
• 🏪 Alexandria - Smouha

🗺️ Open the "Find" page in the app to see the nearest center on the interactive map!

💡 Tip: You can also request our free pickup service! 🚚"

"🔒 Data Security in ELoop:

✅ Full end-to-end encryption
✅ We never share data with third parties
✅ We follow international data protection laws
✅ Protected by state-of-the-art security systems

📱 Before dropping off your device:
• Wipe all personal data
• Perform a Factory Reset
• Remove SIM card and memory cards

💡 Tip: Our engineering team performs an extra certified data wipe before recycling!"

"📋 Accepted Devices in ELoop:

📱 Mobile Phones (iPhone, Samsung, Huawei, etc.)
💻 Laptops & Computers
📟 Tablets (iPad, Galaxy Tab, etc.)
📸 Cameras
🖨️ Printers
🎮 Gaming Consoles
🔌 Electronic Accessories & Chargers
📺 Monitors & TVs

♻️ Any electronic device - even if it's completely dead!

💡 Tip: Use the 'Scan' feature to identify your device automatically!"

"🤝 I'm here to help you with:

💰 Device price valuation
♻️ Explaining the recycling process
📍 Finding collection centers
⭐ Points and Rewards system
🚚 Home pickup requests
🔒 Data security measures
📋 List of accepted devices

Feel free to choose a topic or ask me anything! 😊"
"You\'re very welcome! 😊 I\'m always here if you need any assistance.\n\n🌍 Thank you for contributing to environmental protection with ELoop! Every recycled device makes a difference! 💚"

"Goodbye! 👋

Remember: Your old e-waste can be transformed into rewards! ♻️💚

Come back anytime if you need help! 😊"

"Thank you for your message! 😊

I specialize in electronic device recycling. I can help you with:

• 💰 Device price valuations
• ♻️ Recycling guides and tips
• 📍 Nearest collection centers
• ⭐ Points and rewards system
• 🚚 Free pickup service

Try asking me about any of these topics! 👆"
